name: Vortex Racer
author: Poki
description: Dodge, drift, and boost your way to victory in Vortex Racer! In this 3D racing game, you're the pilot of an anti-gravity vehicle. It's up to you to beat your rivals and win the race! With the money you gain from winning races, you can upgrade your ship to be faster and stronger. Speed is not the only weapon at your disposal though! Pick up rockets along the way to shoot at your rivals. If you hit them, they fly off the track, opening the way for you become number one! There's also time trial levels, where you'll have to drive as fast as possible to beat the fastest times. Are you the best driver in the universe? How to play Vortex Racer? Use the up arrow key or W to accelerate! Use the left and right arrow keys or the A and D keys to move left and right! Who created Vortex Racer? Vortex Racer was created by Deer Cat Games. Play their other games on Poki: Blaze Drifter , Tunnel Rush and Tunnel Rush 2 ! How can I play Vortex Racer for free? You can play Vortex Racer for free on Poki. Can I play Vortex Racer on mobile devices and desktop? Vortex Racer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
